question: In the Gospel of John, what does Jesus say is true of anyone who has seen him?

choices.A: Whoever has seen me has seen the Father
choices.B: Whoever has seen me has seen an angel
choices.C: Whoever has seen me has seen Moses
choices.D: Whoever has seen me has seen only a man

teaching.title: Seeing Jesus and seeing the Father
teaching.body: John reports Jesus telling Philip, “Whoever has seen me has seen the Father.”
